name: PR-quality eval gate fails when mean usefulness across graded PRs falls below 3 out of 5
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus/grades && for i in $(seq 1 20); do printf '{"pr":%d,"graded_useful":true,"usefulness":2}\n' "$i" > pr-corpus/grades/p${i}.json; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/quality-eval.sh" --grades-dir pr-corpus/grades --out pr-corpus/quality-eval.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'mean_usefulness=2.00' err.txt && grep -q 'required>=3' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
